title: Times Higher Education has registered the success of Uskudar…
content:
Times Higher Education has registered the success of Uskudar…

The success of Uskudar University in research and educational activities was also registered by the international rating agency Times Higher Education (THE). While the studies carried out with the ’4-Quality Education' label are appreciated by THE, especially the R&D studies carried out in the field of healthsciences.

Uskudar University has achieved a significant success among international universities in research,innovation and social impact rankings and ranked 4th among foundation universities in Turkey in the "Research Index" ranking conducted through the Scopus database of Scimago Rankings.

Now a new one has been added to this success.

Uskudar University's research and training activities carried out with the "4-Quality Education" label, for which it applied and was entitled to receive it in 2020, were also appreciated by the international rating agency THE. In addition, the R&D studies carried out especially in the field of health sciences have been entitled to receive the "3-Good Health & Well-Being" label with the social impact it provides.

On the other hand, Uskudar University continues to work on being listed in the "Overall Ranking" category with the tags "13-Climate Action", "10-Reduced Inequalities", "16-Peace, Justice, and Strong Institutions" and "17- Partnerships for the Goals", which will be applied soon.

Üsküdar News Agency (ÜHA)
